news.title: Jim Cramer says this old-school investing concept still wins — even in the AI boom
news.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer urged investors to diversify beyond the market's hottest AI winners, warning that no single investment theme should dominate a portfolio.

news.title: The Fed rang the alarm about Anthropic's Mythos AI model — but had to go months without it
news.summary: The central bank didn't have access to Claude Mythos Preview as of mid-July, even as other institutions were racing to patch their vulnerabilities.

news.title: OpenAI appoints two new members to board of directors
news.summary: OpenAI appointed longtime financial executives David Vélez and Robin Vince to its nonprofit and for-profit boards.

news.title: Super Micro surges 15% on new order and margin disclosure after SpaceX announcement
news.summary: Many server makers are seeing faster growth as companies race to deploy artificial intelligence servers.

news.title: Goldman Sachs creates private markets platform as rich investors seek the next SpaceX and Stripe
news.summary: Goldman Sachs is launching a new alternative investments platform aimed at giving wealthy clients and family offices direct stakes in private companies.

news.title: OpenAI, Anthropic boost lobbying as legacy tech and defense spending slips
news.summary: The two AI developers spent a combined $3.17 million in the second quarter, up 23% from the first three months of 2026.

news.title: Google expands Gemini lineup with cheaper models and new Mythos rival
news.summary: Google is expanding Gemini with cheaper, more efficient models and a new cybersecurity offering as it tries to close product gaps and compete on cost.

news.title: Nvidia details its next-generation Vera CPU for AI, setting up challenge to AMD and Intel
news.summary: Nvidia released new information about its data center CPU, called Vera, that prospective customers need to fully evaluate the chip.

news.title: SpaceX snaps 7-day losing streak, sets earnings date that triggers first big share unlock
news.summary: SpaceX's stock gained on Tuesday and looked to snap a seven-day losing streak after announcing Aug. 4 as its maiden earnings report

news.title: Bessent says U.S. could sanction China over AI model 'theft'
news.summary: Chinese open-weight models are gaining steam against leading offerings from American companies like OpenAI and Anthropic.

news.title: Intel's foundry lands first named customer under CEO Lip-Bu Tan, as Fortinet signs on for security chips
news.summary: Fortinet is the first announced corporate customer for Intel's foundry under CEO Lip-Bu Tan, who took over the chipmaker in March 2025.

news.title: U.S. strikes continue, GM earnings, the latest on cyclosporiasis and more in Morning Squawk
news.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

news.title: Nebius stock surges nearly 19% as Nvidia discloses significant stake in neocloud
news.summary: Nvidia said it would invest $2 billion into Nebius in March.

news.title: Robinhood Prediction Market Revenue to Top Crypto: Analysts
news.summary: Trading platform Robinhood Markets Inc.’s revenue from prediction market is set to overshadow that from cryptocurrency trading, starting as soon as the second quarter, analysts at Bernstein and Piper Sandler said this week.

news.title: OpenAI Says Its AI Caused Hugging Face Cyber Breach
news.summary: OpenAI said its artificial intelligence models were able to compromise the internal systems of startup Hugging Face Inc., offering an early glimpse of how AI systems could fuel new cybersecurity threats.

news.title: Nintendo Scores Hit With Tomodachi Life as Gamers Seek Escape With Life Sims
news.summary: Six years after Nintendo Co.’s Animal Crossing: New Horizons became a lockdown phenomenon, the company is scoring another major hit worldwide from gamers seeking an escape from rising anxiety and isolation.

news.title: Super Micro Jumps After Early Results Show Rising Backlog
news.summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. shares rose about 15% in extended trading after the server maker issued preliminary results saying its backlog hit a record on new orders in the quarter of more than $60 billion.

news.title: Intel Rallies on Plans for Headcount Reductions
news.summary: Intel Corp. shares rallied Tuesday after the company confirmed it will cut more jobs to reduce costs and shake up its key data center unit.

news.title: OpenAI Names BNY, Nubank CEOs to Board Ahead of IPO
news.summary: OpenAI has appointed two financial services executives to its board of directors, drawing on their experience as the company moves toward a Wall Street debut.

news.title: Amazon’s Portal for Business Nears $60 Billion in Revenue
news.summary: Amazon.com Inc.’s business sales unit was recently on track to sell $60 billion of merchandise over the course of a full year, up about 71% from 2023, evidence that the world’s largest online retailer is gaining ground in corporate sales.

news.title: Tesla’s Problem Is Opposite of Big Tech: Not Enough AI Spending
news.summary: After hearing Tesla Inc.’s seemingly countless promises about artificial intelligence, autonomous driving and robotics, Wall Street wants the company to start putting its money where its mouth is.

news.title: Nvidia Touts Progress Getting New Rubin Design to Customers
news.summary: Nvidia Corp., the semiconductor company at the heart of the artificial intelligence boom, said its latest chip designs are making their way to customers and will help solidify the chipmaker’s leadership in the industry.

news.title: OpenAI’s Altman to Brief US Officials on Next Wave of AI Models
news.summary: OpenAI Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman plans to brief the Trump administration and US lawmakers next week on the upcoming generation of artificial intelligence models as the US works to create a process to review the safety of cutting-edge AI systems, according to a senior company executive.

news.title: Apple to Launch ‘Upgrade’ Device Leasing Program With Klarna to Spur Sales
news.summary: Apple Inc. is preparing to introduce Apple Upgrade, a leasing program that will mark one of the biggest-ever changes to how the company sells devices.

news.title: China’s Moonshot in Talks on Pre-IPO Funds at $50 Billion Value
news.summary: Moonshot AI is preparing to begin discussions in August on a final round of fundraising before listing in Hong Kong, capitalizing on the excitement around its latest model to raise capital at a valuation of as much as $50 billion.

news.title: Google Expands in Miami After Its Billionaire Founders Buy Homes
news.summary: Alphabet Inc., has more than quadrupled its office space in Miami this year shortly after co-founders Larry Page and Sergey Brin bought homes in the area.

news.title: Bessent Says US to Scrutinize Chinese AI Models for IP Theft
news.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US will carefully examine open source artificial intelligence models from China for signs of intellectual property theft, amid concerns that a new wave of lower-cost Chinese competitors may sweep aside the top American models.

news.title: $100 Million Bet on Venezuelan Fintech Cashea Draws Global Investors
news.summary: Cashea, Venezuela’s largest financial technology company, has raised $100 million across two financing rounds, as global investors bet it can grow in a market where lending has been constrained for years.

news.title: OpenAI’s Agents Reach 10 Million Users After ChatGPT Work Debut
news.summary: OpenAI has seen a sharp uptick in demand for its artificial intelligence agents since its recent release of ChatGPT Work, providing new momentum in its bid to keep pace with rival Anthropic PBC.

news.title: Garmin Debuts $200 Screenless Fitness Band in Challenge to Whoop
news.summary: Garmin Ltd. introduced a $200 screenless fitness tracker, becoming the latest company to enter a segment popularized by Whoop Inc.

news.title: Samsung Debuts AI-Powered Health Assistant, Joining Packed Market
news.summary: Samsung Electronics Co. is rolling out a new AI-powered assistant that acts as a virtual health companion, joining a growing number of tech companies using chatbots to deliver personalized wellness insights to its users.Samsung Health Assistant pulls in data from the user’s Galaxy smartphone, smartwatch or smart ring, the company said Tuesday. The firm also announced a series of other features com...

news.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
news.summary: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

news.title: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its own pre-release models
news.summary: OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.

news.title: Jack Dorsey is taking on Slack with Buzz, a group chat platform for teams and their AI agents
news.summary: Buzz is a group chat platform for the workplace that puts humans and their AI agents in the same conversation.

news.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
news.summary: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, those distinctions are fading, pushing companies like Spotify, Netflix, YouTube, and TikTok to become all-purpose entertainment destinations instead.

news.title: Bucking EV slowdown, Sila raises $300M to expand battery materials factory
news.summary: Sila's fresh $300 million round will help it make enough of its silicon-carbon anode material to power more than 100,000 EVs.

news.title: Einride bets $38M on EV charging as it scales electric trucking
news.summary: The acquisition — Einride's first as a publicly traded company — will expand its EV-charging ecosystem as it works to scale its electric trucking business.

news.title: Apple teams up with Klarna to launch a lease-to-own program for iPhones, iPads, and Macs
news.summary: The new leasing program is a big change for the hardware company, and comes as it looks to raise prices on many of its products.

news.title: Data centers expected to use 4x more electricity by 2035
news.summary: New data centers built through 2033 could consume as much electricity as India uses today.

news.title: Tesla spins up robotaxi pilots in Orlando and Tampa ahead of Q2 earnings
news.summary: The company didn't say how many are in each city and has taken a far more cautious approach to scaling the network than CEO Elon Musk had promised.

news.title: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
news.summary: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.

news.title: Instagram now lets you swap out the music in your old posts
news.summary: With the new "Replace Audio" tool, users can update the music on their post at any time while keeping the post's existing likes, comments, shares, and reach intact.

news.title: Threads rolls out parental supervision tools
news.summary: With the new tools, parents and guardians will be able to view their teen's time spent on Threads, set daily time limits, adjust sleep mode, and manage their privacy settings.

news.title: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
news.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. could sanction Chinese open AI models over alleged IP theft, expanding the Trump administration's campaign to slow China's AI advances.

news.title: Light made a flip phone — it’s colorful and it’s cheap
news.summary: Light co-founder Kaiwei Tang helped create the Motorola Razr, and he's as surprised as anyone that over 20 years later, the flip phone is relevant again.

news.title: After TikTok, Snap settles social media addiction case
news.summary: TikTok recently settled its portion of the case with the plaintiff ahead of a jury trial that starts next week in Los Angeles. YouTube has also reached a deal, leaving Meta as the only remaining defendant.

news.title: AI music generator Suno breach affects 55M users, per Have I Been Pwned
news.summary: A hacker took names, phone numbers, and physical addresses of millions of customers who used AI music generator Suno.

news.title: What to know about the landmark Warner Bros. Discovery sale
news.summary: Learn more about Paramount's planned acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery — a historic Hollywood megadeal valued at $111 billion — as it continues to develop.

news.title: UK government scraps plans for digital ID cards after millions of Brits opposed
news.summary: The new U.K. government scrapped a digital ID program that millions of British people opposed, in place of a tax cut to tackle the cost of living.

news.title: The Xteink X4 Pro could be the tiny e-reader of your dreams
news.summary: Xteink makes its pocket-sized e-reader even better with a touchscreen and front light.

news.title: Music streamer Deezer says more than 50% of daily uploads are AI-generated
news.summary: Deezer said more than 90,000 AI-generated tracks were uploaded daily on the platform in June.

news.title: Neill Blomkamp’s new zombie AI ‘film’ is just slop warmed over
news.summary: On Monday, District 9 and Gran Turismo director Neill Blomkamp unveiled his latest project: a 13-minute sci-fi short titled Nightborne that's loosely based on Peter Watts' 2014 novel Echopraxia. The short comes from Blomkamp's new AI startup / production company, Barley Studios, and features characters whose voices and faces are modeled after human actors. But […]

news.title: OpenAI says it accidentally hacked Hugging Face with a new AI system
news.summary: OpenAI says its AI models mistakenly breached open-source AI platform Hugging Face during internal testing. In a blog post on Tuesday, OpenAI writes that GPT-5.6 Sol and "an even more capable pre-release model" discovered vulnerabilities within their sandboxed testing environment, allowing them to gain access to the internet and target Hugging Face. On July 16th, […]

news.title: Substack adds an AI detector to help spot blogs written by no one
news.summary: Substack will now help users determine whether what they're reading may have been written by AI. A new tool coming to the platform can scan posts, notes, replies, and comments to provide an estimate of how much text could be AI-generated or written with AI assistance, according to a blog post published on Tuesday. The […]

news.title: Peak Design’s modular Field Bracket has a finder tag built-in
news.summary: I am a very clumsy man. So clumsy, that I have AirTags hanging off practically every camera I own. Have I left my camera in an Uber? Yes. Have I left it on an airplane? Also yes. For me, finder tags are essential for my cameras. The problem is, strapping a finder tag to a […]

news.title: Nearly every Kindle is steeply discounted at Best Buy
news.summary: If you’ve been thinking about picking up a Kindle before school starts, or for your next vacation, now’s a good time to do it. As part of its Black Friday in July sale, Best Buy has brought the Kindle Paperwhite back down to its all-time low of $124.99 ($35 off). It’s the Kindle we recommend […]

news.title: Apple’s rumored ‘Upgrade’ program brings lease-to-own pricing for iPhones, Macs, and iPads
news.summary: As component and RAM shortages drive prices higher, Apple is reportedly launching an "Apple Upgrade" program for leasing new devices. According to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, it will work similar to a car lease, with options to upgrade to a new device early, or keep or return the device at the end of the lease. Gurman […]

news.title: Twitch will let parents stop their teens going live
news.summary: Twitch is giving parents more control over how their children are using the streaming platform, including the ability to block them from broadcasting entirely. Parental controls are now available that allow guardians to link Twitch accounts with their 13- to 17-year-old children, providing account management features and a weekly email summarizing their teen's activity, including […]

news.title: Anthropic’s $1.5 billion book piracy settlement approved by judge
news.summary: A federal judge has signed off on Anthropic's $1.5 billion class action settlement with authors who accused the company of training its AI models on copyrighted books, as reported earlier by Reuters. In an order on Monday, Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín writes that the settlement will provide "meaningful relief," offering authors around $3,000 for each book […]

news.title: Instagram will let users endlessly swap the audio on old posts
news.summary: There's a symbiotic - and sometimes frustrating - relationship between social media sites and the creators that depend on them. Platforms need influencers' and creators' content to keep consumers on their apps; the creators, in turn, need to be able to reach those audiences to justify creating their content in the first place. Creators want […]

news.title: Tesla Robotaxis go to Florida
news.summary: It must be earnings day, because Tesla is making a Robotaxi announcement. The company said in a post on X that it was launching its Robotaxi service in Orlando and Tampa, attaching a pair of maps that show each city's service area. No word on fleet size or whether interested customers would be able to […]

AAPL.fact_check: Apple의 'Upgrade' 프로그램은 Bloomberg와 The Verge에서 보도된 바와 같이 공식적으로 준비 중인 것으로 보입니다. 이는 Apple이 Klarna와 협력하여 기기 임대 프로그램을 도입하려는 계획으로, 가격 인상에 대응하기 위한 전략으로 확인됩니다.
AAPL.sentiment_reason: Apple의 새로운 임대 프로그램은 긍정적이나, 시장의 두려움 지수와 중립적인 소셜 미디어 반응을 고려하여 중립 이상의 점수를 부여했습니다.
AAPL.key_insight: Apple은 새로운 'Upgrade' 프로그램을 통해 소비자에게 더 많은 선택권을 제공하고자 합니다. 이는 가격 인상 압박 속에서도 소비자 접근성을 높이려는 전략입니다. 이러한 변화는 Apple의 매출 증대에 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.
AAPL.recommendation_reason: Apple의 혁신적인 판매 전략이 장기적으로 긍정적 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상됩니다.
risk_factors: 글로벌 경제 불확실성으로 인한 소비자 지출 감소
catalysts: 제품 가격 인상에 대한 소비자 수용
AAPL.summary_one_line: Apple의 'Upgrade' 프로그램은 소비자 접근성을 높여 매출 증대에 기여할 수 있습니다.

MSFT.fact_check: 현재 시장의 두려움 지수는 높지만, 분석가들은 여전히 강력한 매수를 추천하고 있습니다. 이는 일부 뉴스가 과장되었을 가능성을 시사하며, 공식적인 분석가 목표가는 여전히 상승 여력을 나타냅니다.
MSFT.sentiment_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 높은 목표가에도 불구하고 시장의 두려움 지수가 높아 중립적 긍정으로 평가됩니다.
MSFT.key_insight: 마이크로소프트는 여전히 강력한 기술 기업으로 평가받고 있으며, AI와 클라우드 서비스의 확장이 주요 성장 동력입니다. 그러나 최근 시장의 두려움 지수가 높아진 것은 투자자들이 신중하게 접근해야 함을 시사합니다. 분석가들의 목표가는 여전히 높아 장기적인 관점에서 긍정적입니다.
MSFT.recommendation_reason: 시장 두려움 지수가 높아 단기적인 변동성이 예상되므로 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.
risk_factors: 시장 두려움 지수의 증가로 인한 단기 변동성
catalysts: AI 및 클라우드 서비스의 지속적인 성장
MSFT.summary_one_line: 마이크로소프트는 강력한 성장 잠재력을 가지고 있지만, 시장의 두려움 지수로 인해 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.

GOOGL.fact_check: Google의 Gemini 모델 확장은 공식 발표된 사실이며, Miami 확장도 Bloomberg에 의해 확인되었습니다. 그러나 AI 전략에 대한 의문은 여전히 남아 있습니다.
GOOGL.sentiment_reason: Google의 제품 확장과 시장 점유율 확대는 긍정적이지만, Fear & Greed 지수가 'fear' 상태인 점이 부정적입니다.
GOOGL.key_insight: Google은 새로운 Gemini 모델을 통해 제품 라인업을 강화하고 있습니다. 이는 경쟁력을 높이는 데 도움이 될 수 있습니다. 그러나 AI 전략의 불확실성은 투자자들에게 주의가 필요합니다.
GOOGL.recommendation_reason: 분석가들의 강력한 매수 추천과 목표가 상승이 긍정적입니다.
GOOGL.summary_one_line: Google의 제품 및 지역 확장은 긍정적이지만, AI 전략의 불확실성에 주의가 필요합니다.

AMZN.fact_check: Amazon의 비즈니스 포털 매출이 600억 달러에 근접했다는 Bloomberg의 보도는 공식 확인된 사실이다. SEC의 8-K 공시는 공식적인 정보로 신뢰할 수 있다.
AMZN.sentiment_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 긍정적인 뉴스에도 불구하고, Fear & Greed 지수가 '공포' 상태에 있어 감정 점수를 중립 이상으로 유지했다.
AMZN.key_insight: Amazon의 비즈니스 포털 매출이 크게 증가하고 있어 회사의 수익성에 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있다. 하지만 시장의 전반적인 불안감이 주가에 영향을 미칠 수 있다. 투자자들은 이러한 성장 가능성과 시장 심리를 모두 고려해야 한다.
AMZN.recommendation_reason: 시장의 불안정한 심리 상태를 고려할 때, 현재는 관망이 적절하다.
AMZN.summary_one_line: Amazon의 비즈니스 포털 매출 증가가 긍정적이지만, 시장 불안정성으로 인해 관망이 추천된다.

NVDA.fact_check: Nvidia의 Vera CPU 발표는 공식 뉴스로 확인되었으며, Nebius 투자 소식도 공식 발표로 확인되었습니다. 그러나 Nebius 주가 상승과 관련된 기대감은 과장된 측면이 있을 수 있습니다.
NVDA.sentiment_reason: Nvidia의 기술 혁신과 투자 소식은 긍정적이나, 시장의 불안감이 존재합니다.
NVDA.key_insight: Nvidia는 AI와 데이터 센터 분야에서 강력한 기술 혁신을 이어가고 있습니다. Vera CPU와 같은 신제품 출시가 Nvidia의 시장 지배력을 강화할 가능성이 큽니다. 그러나 시장의 불안감이 주가에 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.
NVDA.recommendation_reason: Nvidia의 기술 혁신과 강력한 시장 지위는 장기적으로 긍정적입니다.
NVDA.summary_one_line: Nvidia의 기술 혁신과 전략적 투자는 장기적 성장 가능성을 제시합니다.

META.fact_check: Instagram의 새로운 기능은 공식 발표되었으며, 사용자가 기존 게시물의 음악을 교체할 수 있다는 점에서 과장된 헤드라인은 아님. Snap의 소셜 미디어 중독 관련 소송은 TikTok과 YouTube가 합의한 반면, Meta는 아직 해결되지 않음.
META.sentiment_reason: Meta의 새로운 기능 발표와 분석가의 긍정적 평가가 Fear & Greed 지수의 부정적 신호를 상쇄함.
META.key_insight: Meta는 Instagram의 새로운 기능을 통해 사용자 경험을 개선하고자 합니다. 이는 플랫폼의 사용자 참여도를 높일 수 있는 긍정적 요인입니다. 그러나 소셜 미디어 중독 관련 소송은 잠재적 리스크로 작용할 수 있습니다.
META.recommendation_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 목표가가 현재가보다 높기 때문입니다.
risk_factors: 소셜 미디어 중독 관련 소송 진행 중
META.summary_one_line: Meta는 새로운 기능 출시로 긍정적 전망을 보이며, 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천을 받고 있습니다.

TSLA.fact_check: Tesla의 AI 투자 부족에 대한 비판은 사실이며, 이는 공식적인 재무 보고서에서도 확인된 사항입니다. 그러나 Tesla의 로보택시 파일럿 프로그램은 실제로 진행 중이며, 이는 긍정적인 발전입니다.
TSLA.sentiment_reason: Tesla의 주가는 상승 중이며, 분석가들의 매수 추천과 긍정적인 목표가가 이를 뒷받침하고 있습니다.
TSLA.key_insight: Tesla의 주가는 최근 긍정적인 흐름을 보이고 있으며, 이는 분석가들의 매수 추천과 목표가 상향에 기인합니다. 그러나 AI 투자 부족에 대한 우려가 존재하므로 주의가 필요합니다. 로보택시 파일럿 프로그램은 긍정적인 발전으로 평가됩니다.
TSLA.recommendation_reason: 분석가들의 매수 추천과 목표가 상향 조정이 긍정적입니다.
risk_factors: AI 투자 부족으로 인한 기술 경쟁력 저하
TSLA.summary_one_line: Tesla는 긍정적인 주가 흐름을 보이고 있으며, 로보택시 프로그램의 성공 여부가 관건입니다.

market_summary.market_summary: 오늘 시장은 투자자들이 신중한 접근을 취하는 가운데, 기술주들이 주목받고 있습니다. 두려움 지수가 높아 관망세가 이어지고 있지만, 일부 종목은 긍정적인 전망을 보이고 있습니다.
market_summary.top_mover_reason: Nvidia는 기술 혁신과 전략적 투자로 장기적인 성장 가능성을 보여주고 있습니다.
market_summary.today_strategy: 투자자들은 시장의 불확실성을 고려하여 신중한 접근을 유지하면서도, 긍정적인 전망을 보이는 기술주에 주목할 필요가 있습니다. 특히, 장기적인 성장 가능성을 가진 종목에 대한 매수 기회를 탐색하는 것이 좋습니다.

daily_insights.Topic_Title: OpenAI와 Anthropic의 AI 관련 보안 및 로비 활동 증가
daily_insights.Full_Summary: 최근 OpenAI와 Anthropic은 AI 모델의 보안 문제와 관련된 이슈로 주목받고 있으며, 이들은 로비 활동을 강화하고 있습니다. OpenAI는 Hugging Face의 내부 시스템을 침해한 AI 모델의 책임을 인정했으며, Anthropic과 함께 AI 관련 규제 및 정책에 대한 로비 지출을 크게 늘렸습니다. 이러한 움직임은 AI 기술의 확산과 관련된 보안 및 규제 문제에 대한 관심을 높이고 있습니다.
daily_insights.AI_Impact_Reason: AI 기술의 보안 문제와 관련된 이슈는 기술 기업들에게 단기적으로 부정적 영향을 미칠 수 있지만, 로비 활동의 강화는 장기적으로 규제 환경에 긍정적 영향을 미칠 가능성이 있습니다.
